title: pet
content:
# pet

This section contains 8 endpoints.

<CardGroup cols={2}>
<Card title="Add a new pet to the store." href="/api-reference/pet/post-pet">
`POST` /pet
</Card>
<Card title="Update an existing pet." href="/api-reference/pet/put-pet">
`PUT` /pet
</Card>
<Card title="Finds Pets by status." href="/api-reference/pet/get-pet-findByStatus">
`GET` /pet/findByStatus
</Card>
<Card title="Finds Pets by tags." href="/api-reference/pet/get-pet-findByTags">
`GET` /pet/findByTags
</Card>
<Card title="Find pet by ID." href="/api-reference/pet/get-pet-petId">
`GET` /pet/{petId}
</Card>
<Card title="Updates a pet in the store with form data." href="/api-reference/pet/post-pet-petId">
`POST` /pet/{petId}
</Card>
<Card title="Deletes a pet." href="/api-reference/pet/delete-pet-petId">
`DELETE` /pet/{petId}
</Card>
<Card title="Uploads an image." href="/api-reference/pet/post-pet-petId-uploadImage">
`POST` /pet/{petId}/uploadImage
</Card>
</CardGroup>
